CustomField.description: Checkbox resolves to True for System Enhancement (associated to any object except Asset) request tickets and Data Quality Request tickets and tickets with Non Carlyle Asset checked.
CustomField.formula: IF( RecordType.Name = 'System Enhancement Ticket' || (RecordType.Name = 'Data Quality Request' && (NOT(CONTAINS( pro_Affected_Object__c , 'Asset')) || NOT(CONTAINS(pro_Affected_Object__c , 'Assembly')))), True, IF( pro_Non_Carlyle_Asset__c = True, True, False))
CustomField.label: No Assets Attached
